# AI ROI Calculator by OptimNow
# https://airoicalculator.optimnow.io

> Free web application to calculate return on investment for AI and LLM implementations.

This is a client-side React application that helps organizations make data-driven decisions about AI implementations by analyzing costs, value generation, break-even scenarios, and sensitivity analysis.

## Features

- 3-layer cost framework: Infrastructure (model inference), Harness (orchestration, retrieval, monitoring), Business Value
- 4 value measurement methods: Cost Displacement, Revenue Uplift, Retention Uplift, Premium Monetization
- Break-even analysis with ROI curve visualization
- Sensitivity analysis with tornado charts
- Unlimited scenario comparison
- 11 preset use cases: Customer Support Bot, Knowledge Q&A, Meeting Summary, Marketing Content, Coding Task, Invoice Processing, Call Summary, Agent Workflow, E-commerce Recommendations, Customer Retention AI, AI Premium Features
- Client-side only — no data collection, fully offline-capable after initial load

## Built by

OptimNow — https://www.optimnow.io
